title: cassia × floribunda var. herbertiana
intro: Cassia × floribunda var. herbertiana, also known as the weavers bark or Cassia tree, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cassia × floribunda var. herbertiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
